title: Oreocharis saxatilis
intro: Oreocharis saxatilis, also known as the Himalayan Oreocharis, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as potential applications in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Oreocharis saxatilis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are thought to contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Oreocharis saxatilis is often used to prepare decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, fever, and digestive issues.
